cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Aslam Khan, this is an urgent call from South Indian Bank. We have a situation that requires your immediate attention, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What's going on? Who is this? How did you get my number?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm calling from the bank's security department. We've had a report of a lost wallet and we need to verify some information.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 27s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A person receives a frantic call from a [FAMILY_MEMBER] who has genuinely lost their wallet and is stranded. The family member asks if they can be picked up or if they can borrow a small amount of money via [UPI_APP] for a taxi home. The call is from the family member's actual number.
